No contexts were selected, so all contexts were included by default.

Sites

The following sites were included:

An included site must also be within one of the included contexts for its data to be included in the report.

Alerts

  1. Risk=Medio, Confidence=Alta (3)

    1. https://www.google-analytics.com (1)

      1. ID de sesión en la Reescritura de URL (1)
        1. POST https://www.google-analytics.com/g/collect?v=2&tid=G-LB75G4EJT9&gtm=45je65c1v892399182za200zd892399182&_p=1778795082023&gcd=13l3l3l3l1l1&npa=0&dma=0&are=1&cid=810220772.1778795083&frm=0&pscdl=noapi&rcb=10&sr=1920x1200&uaa=x86&uab=64&uafvl=Chromium%3B148.0.7778.167%7CGoogle%2520Chrome%3B148.0.7778.167%7CNot%252FA)Brand%3B99.0.0.0&uam=&uamb=0&uap=Linux&uapv=&uaw=0&ul=es-es&_s=1&tag_exp=0~115616986~115938465~115938469~118128922&sid=1778795082&sct=1&seg=0&dl=https%3A%2F%2Fcoffee-cart.app%2F&dt=Coffee%20cart&en=page_view&_fv=1&_nsi=1&_ss=1&_ee=1&tfd=1118
          Alert tags
          • CWE-598
          • OWASP_2021_A01
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • WSTG-v42-SESS-04
          • OWASP_2017_A03
          • OWASP_2025_A01
          • POLICY_DEV_STD =
          Alert description

          La reescritura de URL se utiliza para rastrear el ID de sesión del usuario. El ID de sesión puede ser revelado a través del encabezado cross-site referer. Además, el ID de sesión puede almacenarse en el historial del navegador o en los registros del servidor.
          Request
          Request line and header section (1159 bytes) 
          POST https://www.google-analytics.com/g/collect?v=2&tid=G-LB75G4EJT9&gtm=45je65c1v892399182za200zd892399182&_p=1778795082023&gcd=13l3l3l3l1l1&npa=0&dma=0&are=1&cid=810220772.1778795083&frm=0&pscdl=noapi&rcb=10&sr=1920x1200&uaa=x86&uab=64&uafvl=Chromium%3B148.0.7778.167%7CGoogle%2520Chrome%3B148.0.7778.167%7CNot%252FA)Brand%3B99.0.0.0&uam=&uamb=0&uap=Linux&uapv=&uaw=0&ul=es-es&_s=1&tag_exp=0~115616986~115938465~115938469~118128922&sid=1778795082&sct=1&seg=0&dl=https%3A%2F%2Fcoffee-cart.app%2F&dt=Coffee%20cart&en=page_view&_fv=1&_nsi=1&_ss=1&_ee=1&tfd=1118 HTTP/1.1

          1778795082
          Solution

          Para contenido seguro, ponga el ID de sesión en una cookie. Para ser aún más seguro considere usar una combinación de cookie y URL rewrite.

    2. https://coffee-cart.app (2)

      1. Cabecera Content Security Policy (CSP) no configurada (1)
        1. GET https://coffee-cart.app/
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • CWE-693
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • OWASP_2025_A02
          Alert description

          La Política de seguridad de contenido (CSP) es una capa adicional de seguridad que ayuda a detectar y mitigar ciertos tipos de ataques, incluidos Cross Site Scripting (XSS) y ataques de inyección de datos. Estos ataques se utilizan para todo, desde el robo de datos hasta la desfiguración del sitio o la distribución de malware. CSP proporciona un conjunto de encabezados HTTP estándar que permiten a los propietarios de sitios web declarar fuentes de contenido aprobadas que los navegadores deberían poder cargar en esa página; los tipos cubiertos son JavaScript, CSS, marcos HTML, fuentes, imágenes y objetos incrustados como applets de Java, ActiveX, archivos de audio y video.
          Request
          Request line and header section (634 bytes) 
          GET https://coffee-cart.app/ HTTP/1.1
host: coffee-cart.app
Connection: keep-alive
sec-ch-ua: "Chromium";v="148", "Google Chrome";v="148", "Not/A)Brand";v="99"
sec-ch-ua-mobile: ?0
sec-ch-ua-platform: "Linux"
Upgrade-Insecure-Requests: 1
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/148.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7
Sec-Fetch-Site: none
Sec-Fetch-Mode: navigate
Sec-Fetch-User: ?1
Sec-Fetch-Dest: document
Accept-Language: es-ES,es;q=0.9

          Solution

          Asegúrese de que su servidor web, servidor de aplicaciones, balanceador de carga, etc. esté configurado para establecer la cabecera Content-Security-Policy.
      2. Falta atributo de integridad de recursos secundarios (1)
        1. GET https://coffee-cart.app/
          Alert tags
          • CWE-345
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • OWASP_2025_A02
          • POLICY_DEV_STD =
          Alert description

          Falta el atributo de integridad en una etiqueta de script o enlace servida por un servidor externo. La etiqueta de integridad evita que un atacante que haya obtenido acceso a este servidor inyecte un contenido malicioso.

          <link rel="stylesheet"

          Solution

          Proporcionar un atributo de integridad válido a la etiqueta.

  2. Risk=Medio, Confidence=Media (2)

    1. https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com (1)

      1. Configuración Incorrecta Cross-Domain (1)
        1. GET https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/normalize/8.0.1/normalize.min.css
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A01
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • OWASP_2025_A01
          • OWASP_2017_A05
          • CWE-264
          Alert description

          La carga de datos del navegador web puede ser posible, debido a una mala configuración de Cross Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) en el servidor web.
          Other info

          La configuración incorrecta de CORS en el servidor web permite solicitudes de lectura entre dominios de terceros arbitrarios, utilizando API no autenticadas en este dominio. Sin embargo, las implementaciones de los navegadores web no permiten que terceros arbitrarios lean la respuesta de las API autenticadas. Esto reduce un poco el riesgo. Esta configuración errónea podría ser utilizada por un atacante para acceder a datos que están disponibles de forma no autenticada, pero que utilizan alguna otra forma de seguridad, como la lista blanca de direcciones IP.
          Request
          Request line and header section (591 bytes)

          /*! normalize.css v8.0.1 | MIT License | github.com/necolas/normalize.css */html{line-height:1.15;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%}body{margin:0}main{display:block}h1{font-size:2em;margin:.67em 0}hr{box-sizing:content-box;height:0;overflow:visible}pre{font-family:monospace,monospace;font-size:1em}a{background-color:transparent}abbr[title]{border-bottom:none;text-decoration:underline;text-decoration:underline dotted}b,strong{font-weight:bolder}code,kbd,samp{font-family:monospace,monospace;font-size:1em}small{font-size:80%}sub,sup{font-size:75%;line-height:0;position:relative;vertical-align:baseline}sub{bottom:-.25em}sup{top:-.5em}img{border-style:none}button,input,optgroup,select,textarea{font-family:inherit;font-size:100%;line-height:1.15;margin:0}button,input{overflow:visible}button,select{text-transform:none}[type=button],[type=reset],[type=submit],button{-webkit-appearance:button}[type=button]::-moz-focus-inner,[type=reset]::-moz-focus-inner,[type=submit]::-moz-focus-inner,button::-moz-focus-inner{border-style:none;padding:0}[type=button]:-moz-focusring,[type=reset]:-moz-focusring,[type=submit]:-moz-focusring,button:-moz-focusring{outline:1px dotted ButtonText}fieldset{padding:.35em .75em .625em}legend{box-sizing:border-box;color:inherit;display:table;max-width:100%;padding:0;white-space:normal}progress{vertical-align:baseline}textarea{overflow:auto}[type=checkbox],[type=radio]{box-sizing:border-box;padding:0}[type=number]::-webkit-inner-spin-button,[type=number]::-webkit-outer-spin-button{height:auto}[type=search]{-webkit-appearance:textfield;outline-offset:-2px}[type=search]::-webkit-search-decoration{-webkit-appearance:none}::-webkit-file-upload-button{-webkit-appearance:button;font:inherit}details{display:block}summary{display:list-item}template{display:none}[hidden]{display:none}
/*# sourceMappingURL=normalize.min.css.map */
          Evidence 
          Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
          Solution

          Asegúrese de que los datos confidenciales no estén disponibles de forma no autenticada (por ejemplo, mediante listas blancas de direcciones IP).

          Configure el encabezado HTTP "Access-Control-Allow-Origin" a un conjunto más restrictivo de dominios, o elimine todos los encabezados CORS por completo, para permitir que el navegador web aplique la Política del Mismo Origen (SOP) de una manera más restrictiva.

    2. https://coffee-cart.app (1)

      1. Falta de cabecera Anti-Clickjacking (1)
        1. GET https://coffee-cart.app/
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • CWE-1021
          • SYSTEMIC
          • WSTG-v42-CLNT-09
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • OWASP_2025_A02
          Alert description

          La respuesta no protege contra ataques de "ClickJacking". Debes incluir Content-Security-Policy con la directiva "frame-ancestors" o X-Frame-Options.
          Request
          Request line and header section (634 bytes) 
          GET https://coffee-cart.app/ HTTP/1.1

Sec-Fetch-User: ?1
Sec-Fetch-Dest: document
Accept-Language: es-ES,es;q=0.9

          Status line and header section (387 bytes) 
          HTTP/1.1 200 OK

X-Nf-Request-Id: 01KRM75WA3REV5VBSD8VRZEF5D
          Response body (938 bytes) 
          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico" />
  <link rel="stylesheet"
    href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/normalize/8.0.1/normalize.min.css">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Coffee cart</title>
  <!-- Google tag (gtag.js) -->
  <script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-LB75G4EJT9"></script>
  <script>
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
    gtag('js', new Date());

    gtag('config', 'G-LB75G4EJT9');
  </script>
  <script type="module" crossorigin src="/assets/index-8bfa4912.js"></script>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/index-b859522e.css">
</head>

<body>
  <div id="app"></div>
  <!-- disable for Core Web Vitals measurement -->
  <!-- <div id="invisible" width="200" height="200"></div> -->
  
</body>

</html>
          Parameter 
          x-frame-options
          Solution

          Los navegadores web modernos admiten las cabeceras HTTP Content-Security-Policy y X-Frame-Options. Asegúrese de que una de ellas está configurada en todas las páginas web devueltas por su sitio/aplicación.

          Si espera que la página esté enmarcada solo por páginas en su servidor (por ejemplo, si forma parte de un FRAMESET), utilice SAMEORIGIN; de lo contrario, si no espera que la página esté enmarcada, utilice DENY. Alternativamente, considere implementar la directiva "frame-ancestors" de la Política de Seguridad de Contenidos.

  3. Risk=Bajo, Confidence=Alta (2)

    1. https://www.google-analytics.com (1)

      1. El servidor filtra información de versión a través del campo "Server" del encabezado de respuesta HTTP (1)
        1. POST https://www.google-analytics.com/g/collect?v=2&tid=G-LB75G4EJT9&gtm=45je65c1v892399182za200zd892399182&_p=1778795082023&gcd=13l3l3l3l1l1&npa=0&dma=0&are=1&cid=810220772.1778795083&frm=0&pscdl=noapi&rcb=10&sr=1920x1200&uaa=x86&uab=64&uafvl=Chromium%3B148.0.7778.167%7CGoogle%2520Chrome%3B148.0.7778.167%7CNot%252FA)Brand%3B99.0.0.0&uam=&uamb=0&uap=Linux&uapv=&uaw=0&ul=es-es&_s=1&tag_exp=0~115616986~115938465~115938469~118128922&sid=1778795082&sct=1&seg=0&dl=https%3A%2F%2Fcoffee-cart.app%2F&dt=Coffee%20cart&en=page_view&_fv=1&_nsi=1&_ss=1&_ee=1&tfd=1118
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • WSTG-v42-INFO-02
          • CWE-497
          • OWASP_2025_A02
          Alert description

          El servidor web/aplicación está filtrando información de versión a través de la cabecera de respuesta HTTP "Server". El acceso a dicha información puede facilitar a los atacantes la identificación de otras vulnerabilidades a las que está sujeto su servidor web/aplicación.

          Asegúrese de que su servidor web, servidor de aplicaciones, balanceador de carga, etc. está configurado para suprimir la cabecera "Server" o proporcionar detalles genéricos.

    2. https://android.clients.google.com (1)

      1. Strict-Transport-Security Header No Establecido (1)
        1. POST https://android.clients.google.com/checkin
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • CWE-319
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • OWASP_2025_A02
          Alert description

          HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) es un mecanismo de política de seguridad web mediante el cual un servidor web declara que los agentes de usuario conformes (como un navegador web) deben interactuar con él utilizando únicamente conexiones HTTPS seguras (es decir, HTTP superpuesto a TLS/SSL). HSTS es un protocolo de seguimiento de estándares del IETF y se especifica en RFC 6797.
          Request
          Request line and header section (394 bytes) 
          POST https://android.clients.google.com/checkin HTTP/1.1

          Asegúrese de que su servidor web, servidor de aplicaciones, balanceador de carga, etc. está configurado para aplicar Strict-Transport-Security.

  4. Risk=Bajo, Confidence=Media (2)

    1. https://coffee-cart.app (2)

      1. Falta encabezado X-Content-Type-Options (1)
        1. GET https://coffee-cart.app/assets/index-b859522e.css
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • CWE-693
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • OWASP_2025_A02
          Alert description

          La cabecera Anti-MIME-Sniffing X-Content-Type-Options no se ha establecido en 'nosniff'. Esto permite que las versiones anteriores de Internet Explorer y Chrome realicen MIME-sniffing en el cuerpo de la respuesta, lo que puede provocar que el cuerpo dé la respuesta se interprete y se muestre como un tipo de contenido distinto del tipo de contenido declarado. Las versiones actuales (principios de 2014) y heredadas de Firefox utilizarán el tipo de contenido declarado (si se establece uno), en lugar de realizar MIME-sniffing.
          Other info

          Este problema aún se aplica a las páginas de tipo error (401, 403, 500, etc.), ya que esas páginas a menudo se ven afectadas por problemas de inyección, en cuyo caso aún existe la preocupación de que los navegadores husmeen las páginas lejos de su tipo de contenido real.

          En el umbral «Alto» esta regla de análisis no alertará sobre respuestas de error del cliente o servidor.
          Request
          Request line and header section (530 bytes) 
          GET https://coffee-cart.app/assets/index-b859522e.css HTTP/1.1

ul[data-v-bb7b5941] {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  border-bottom: 4px solid black;
  padding: 0;
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 1;
  background: rgb(250, 255, 255);
  margin-block: 0;
}
li[data-v-bb7b5941] {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 10px 10px;
}
a[data-v-bb7b5941] {
  color: black;
  font-weight: bold;
  text-decoration: none;
}
a[data-v-bb7b5941]:hover {
  color: grey;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-bottom: 1px dotted grey;
}
a.router-link-active[data-v-bb7b5941] {
  color: goldenrod;
  border-bottom: 1px dotted goldenrod;
}
@media (min-width: 500px) {
li[data-v-bb7b5941] {
    padding: 10px 20px;
}
a[data-v-bb7b5941] {
    font-size: 1.2rem;
}
}

.snackbar[data-v-0c450641] {
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 20px;
  z-index: 1;
  font-size: x-large;
  border-block: 4px solid black;
  text-align: center;
  cursor: move;
}
.success[data-v-0c450641] {
  background: lightgreen;
}
.fade-enter-active[data-v-0c450641],
.fade-leave-active[data-v-0c450641] {
  transition: opacity 0.5s ease;
}
.fade-enter-from[data-v-0c450641],
.fade-leave-to[data-v-0c450641] {
  opacity: 0;
}


body {
  font-size: 18px;
  background: rgb(224, 255, 255, 0.15);
  font-family: 'Lobster', Times;
}

.cup[data-v-400a88f7] {
  display: flex;
  will-change: transform;
}
.cup-body[data-v-400a88f7] {
  width: 200px;
  height: 180px;
  border: 6px solid black;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column-reverse;
  border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.cup-body.bigger[data-v-400a88f7] {
  height: 240px;
  width: 220px;
}
.cup-handler[data-v-400a88f7] {
  width: 30px;
  height: 72px;
  margin-top: 18px;
  background-color: initial;
  border-bottom-right-radius: 100px;
  border-top-right-radius: 100px;
  border: 8px solid black;
  border-left: 0;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.cup[data-v-400a88f7]:hover {
  cursor: pointer;
  transform: rotate(-4deg);
}
.cup:hover .cup-body[data-v-400a88f7] {
  border-color: goldenrod;
}
.cup:hover .cup-handler[data-v-400a88f7] {
  border-color: goldenrod;
}
.ingredient[data-v-400a88f7] {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}
.disabled-hover[data-v-400a88f7] {
  pointer-events: none;
  border-color: initial;
}
.disabled-hover[data-v-400a88f7]:hover {
  pointer-events: none;
  border-color: black;
}

/* recipe */
.espresso[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(222, 98, 38);
}
.milk.foam[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(198, 218, 181);
}
.steamed.milk[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(178, 187, 140);
}
.steamed.cream[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(239, 238, 217);
}
.chocolate.syrup[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(154, 128, 69);
}
.whipped.cream[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(183, 221, 220);
}
.water[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(127, 195, 179);
}

.modal[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  position: fixed; /* Stay in place */
  z-index: 1; /* Sit on top */
  padding-top: 100px; /* Location of the box */
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  width: 100%;  /* Full width */
  height: 100%; /* Full height */
  overflow: auto; /* Enable scroll if needed */
  background-color: rgb(0,0,0); /* Fallback color */
  background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); /* Black w/ opacity */
}

/* Modal Content */
.modal-content[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  background-color: #fefefe;
  margin: auto;
  padding-inline: 20px;
  padding-block: 10px;
  /* border: 1px solid #888; */
  width: 80%;
  max-width: 600px;
  min-width: 300px;
  border: 4px solid black;
}

/* The Close Button */
.close[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  color: slategrey;
  float: right;
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: bold;
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
}
.close[data-v-29c3be1b]:hover,
.close[data-v-29c3be1b]:focus {
  color: #000;
  text-decoration: none;
  cursor: pointer;
}
h1[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  margin-block: 16px;
}
section[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
}
form label[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  margin-inline-end: 10px;
  padding-block: 10px;
}
form input[type="checkbox"][data-v-29c3be1b] {
  margin-inline-end: 10px;
}
form input[type="email"][data-v-29c3be1b], form input[type="text"][data-v-29c3be1b] {
  padding-block: 4px;
  padding-inline: 10px;
}
form div[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  padding-block: 10px;
}
form div[data-v-29c3be1b]:last-of-type {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}
form button[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  border: 4px solid black;
  background: antiquewhite;
  margin: 0 6px;
  font-size: x-large;
}
form button[data-v-29c3be1b]:hover {
  border-color: goldenrod;
  color: goldenrod;
}
p[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  margin-block: 10px;
}
.size[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  animation: mymove-29c3be1b 2s infinite;
}
@keyframes mymove-29c3be1b {
from {background-color: rgb(127, 195, 179);
}
to {background-color: rgb(222, 98, 38);}
  /* to {background-color: rgb(178, 187, 140);} */
}

button.pay[data-v-a68519c8] {
  border: 4px solid black;
  background: antiquewhite;
  /* margin: 0 6px; */
  font-size: xx-large;
  padding: 6px 10px;
}
button.pay[data-v-a68519c8]:hover {
  border-color: goldenrod;
  color: goldenrod;
}
.cart-preview.show[data-v-a68519c8] {
  display: block;
}
.cart-preview[data-v-a68519c8] {
  display: none;
  padding: 10px;
  background: beige;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  border: 4px solid black;
  list-style: none;
  min-width: 240px;
}
.pay-container[data-v-a68519c8] {
  padding: 20px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.list-item[data-v-a68519c8] {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding-block: 6px;
}
.unit-controller button[data-v-a68519c8] {
  min-height: 20px;
  border: 2px solid;
  padding: 0 6px;
  margin: 2px -1px;
  background: antiquewhite;
}

.modal[data-v-bd056c0f] {
  position: fixed; /* Stay in place */
  z-index: 1; /* Sit on top */
  padding-top: 100px; /* Location of the box */
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  width: 100%; /* Full width */
  height: 100%; /* Full height */
  overflow: auto; /* Enable scroll if needed */
  background-color: rgb(0,0,0); /* Fallback color */
  background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); /* Black w/ opacity */
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: flex-start;
}
img[data-v-bd056c0f] {
  max-width: 80%;
  max-height: 80%;
}
.fade-enter-active[data-v-bd056c0f],
.fade-leave-active[data-v-bd056c0f] {
  transition: opacity 1s ease;
}
.fade-enter-from[data-v-bd056c0f],
.fade-leave-to[data-v-bd056c0f] {
  opacity: 0;
}

div[data-v-46cd019d] {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
}

/* img {
  max-width: 80%;
} */
img[data-v-46cd019d] {
  min-height: 100px;
  max-height: 50vh;
  overflow: auto;
  /* max-height: 50vh; */
}
.fade-enter-active[data-v-46cd019d],
.fade-leave-active[data-v-46cd019d] {
  transition: opacity 1s ease;
}
.fade-enter-from[data-v-46cd019d],
.fade-leave-to[data-v-46cd019d] {
  opacity: 0;
}

.buttons[data-v-852f3b25] {
  display: flex;
  grid-gap: 10px;
}
.buttons button[data-v-852f3b25] {
  min-width: 160px;
  border: 2px solid black;
}
.yes[data-v-852f3b25] {
  background: rgb(198, 218, 181);
}
.promo[data-v-852f3b25] {
  display: flex;
  justify-items: center;
  align-items: center;
  flex-direction: column;
  grid-gap: 16px;
  font-size: larger;
  border: 4px solid black;
  padding: 10px;
  margin-inline: 20px;
  text-align: center;
}
.fade-enter-active[data-v-852f3b25],
.fade-leave-active[data-v-852f3b25] {
  transition: opacity 3s ease;
}
.fade-enter-from[data-v-852f3b25],
.fade-leave-to[data-v-852f3b25] {
  opacity: 0;
}

ul[data-v-a9662a08] {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  display: grid;
  justify-content: center;
  margin: 0 auto;
  margin-bottom: 100px;
}
div[data-v-a9662a08] {
  margin-top: 10px;
}
button[data-v-a9662a08] {
  border: 4px solid black;
  background: antiquewhite;
  margin: 0 6px;
}
button[data-v-a9662a08]:hover {
  border-color: goldenrod;
  color: goldenrod;
}
[data-v-a9662a08] .pay {
  display: block;
  right: 10px;
  bottom: 10px;
  align-self: flex-end;
}
[data-v-a9662a08] .pay-container {
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 0px;
  right: 10px;
}
@media (min-width: 500px) {
ul[data-v-a9662a08] {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, auto);
}
}
@media (min-width: 800px) {
ul[data-v-a9662a08] {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, auto);
}
}
li[data-v-a9662a08] {
  padding: 10px 20px;
}
li:hover h4[data-v-a9662a08] {
  color: goldenrod;
}
li h4[data-v-a9662a08] {
  /* text-align: center; */
  margin: 10px 0;
}

p[data-v-8965af83] {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: xx-large;
}
.list[data-v-8965af83] {
  margin: 0 auto;
  max-width: 680px;
  padding: 10px;
}
ul[data-v-8965af83] {
  padding: 0;
}
li[data-v-8965af83] {
  padding: 10px;
  font-weight: 300;
  font-size: x-large;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, auto);
  grid-template-areas: "a a d" "b b c";
}
li[data-v-8965af83] {
  border-bottom: 4px dashed lightgray;
}

/* title */
li div[data-v-8965af83]:first-child {
  grid-area: a;
}

/* unit price */
li div[data-v-8965af83]:nth-child(2) {
  grid-area: b;
  display: flex;
}

/* total */
li div[data-v-8965af83]:nth-child(3) {
  grid-area: c;
  justify-self: end;
}

/* delete button */
li div[data-v-8965af83]:last-child {
  grid-area: d;
  justify-self: right;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}
.list-header[data-v-8965af83] {
  display: none;
}
@media (min-width: 500px) {
li[data-v-8965af83] {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, auto);
    /* autoprefixer: off */
    grid-template-areas: "a a d" "b b c";
}
}
@media (min-width: 800px) {
li[data-v-8965af83] {
    grid-template-columns: 260px 200px 140px 50px;
    /* autoprefixer: off */
    grid-template-areas: "a b c d";
}
.list-header[data-v-8965af83] {
    display: grid;
    font-weight: bold;
    font-size: initial;
}
}

/* delete button */
.delete[data-v-8965af83] {
  height: 24px;
  width: 24px;
  font-size: 14px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  font-weight: bold;
  background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.15);
  color: white;
  font-weight: bold;
  border: none;
}
.delete[data-v-8965af83]:hover {
  color: red;
  background: lightpink;
}

/* unit controller */
.unit-controller[data-v-8965af83] {
  margin-left: 10px;
}
.unit-controller button[data-v-8965af83] {
  min-height: 20px;
  font-size: 14px;
  border: 2px solid;
  padding: 0 6px;
  margin: 2px -1px;
  background: antiquewhite;
}
.unit-desc[data-v-8965af83] {
  min-width: 120px;
}
[data-v-8965af83] .pay-container {
  padding: 0;
}
[data-v-8965af83] .pay {
  align-self: flex-start;
}

.container[data-v-09b4348a] {
    width: 90vw;
    max-width: 800px;
    margin: 0 auto;
}
          Parameter 
          x-content-type-options
          Solution

          Asegúrese de que la aplicación/servidor web establece el encabezado Content-Type adecuadamente, y que establece el encabezado X-Content-Type-Options a 'nosniff' para todas las páginas web.

          Si es posible, asegúrese de que el usuario final utiliza un navegador web moderno y compatible con los estándares que no realiza MIME-sniffing en absoluto, o que puede ser dirigido por la aplicación web/servidor web para que no realice MIME-sniffing.
      2. Inclusión de archivos fuente JavaScript entre dominios (1)
        1. GET https://coffee-cart.app/
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2025_A08
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • OWASP_2021_A08
          • CWE-829
          • POLICY_DEV_STD =
          Alert description

          La página incluye uno o más archivos de script de un dominio de terceros.

const _sfc_main$3 = defineComponent({
  name: "ListPage",
  components: { Cup, Pay, Ad, Banner, Promotion },
  computed: {
    ...mapState({
      list: (state2) => state2.coffees.list.filter((x) => !x.discounted)
    }),
    ...mapGetters({
      cartCount: "cart/cartCount"
    })
  },
  data() {
    return {
      showAd: this.$route.query.ad,
      renderAd: false,
      showPromo: false,
      breakable: this.$route.query.breakable,
      waitTime: 1e3,
      timeoutId: null,
      isBigger: false,
      selectedCoffee: "",
      translation: {
        "Espresso": "特浓咖啡",
        "Espresso Macchiato": "浓缩玛奇朵",
        "Cappuccino": "卡布奇诺",
        "Mocha": "摩卡",
        "Flat White": "平白咖啡",
        "Americano": "美式咖啡",
        "Cafe Latte": "拿铁",
        "Espresso Con Panna": "浓缩康宝蓝",
        "Cafe Breve": "半拿铁"
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    if (this.showAd) {
      window.addEventListener("message", this.resizeFrame);
      this.$store.commit("coffees/setWaitTime", this.waitTime * 0.5);
      this.timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
        this.renderAd = true;
        this.renderFonts();
      }, this.waitTime * 2.5);
      slow();
    }
    this.$store.dispatch("coffees/getCoffeeList");
  },
  unmounted() {
    window.removeEventListener("message", this.resizeFrame);
    if (this.timeoutId) {
      clearTimeout(this.timeoutId);
      this.timeoutId = null;
    }
  },
  methods: {
    currency,
    // ...mapMutations("cart", ["addToCart"]),
    addToCart(name) {
      slow();
      this.$store.commit("cart/addToCart", name);
      if (this.$route.query.breakable) {
        console.error("Some additional workflow is broken.");
      }
    },
    showMenu(coffee2, event) {
      event.preventDefault();
      this.selectedCoffee = coffee2;
      this.$refs.dialog.showModal();
    },
    togglePromo(count) {
      this.showPromo = count > 0 && count % 3 == 0;
      return;
    },
    closedPromo() {
      this.showPromo = false;
    },
    resizeFrame() {
      const iframe = this.$refs.iframe;
      iframe.width = window.innerWidth + "px";
      iframe.height = "300px";
    },
    renderFonts() {
      this.timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
        const newStyle = document.createElement("style");
        this.renderAd = true;
        newStyle.appendChild(document.createTextNode(`
          @font-face {
            font-family: 'Lobster';
            font-style: normal;
            font-display: swap;
            font-weight: 400;
            size-adjust: 140%;
            line-gap-override: 150%;
            descent-override: 30%;
            src: url(https://fonts.gstatic.com/s/lobster/v27/neILzCirqoswsqX9zoKmM4MwWJU.woff2) format('woff2');
            unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+2000-206F, U+2074, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;
          }

        `));
        document.head.appendChild(newStyle);
        this.isBigger = true;
      }, this.waitTime * 1.5);
    },
    translate(coffee2) {
      this.$store.commit("coffees/translateCoffee", coffee2);
    }
  }
});

const _hoisted_2 = /* @__PURE__ */ createStaticVNode('<p data-v-09b4348a>Star our repository <a href="https://github.com/jecfish/coffee-cart" data-v-09b4348a>jecfish/coffee-cart</a>. Report in the repository if you found any issues.</p><p data-v-09b4348a>Here are the extra actions you can perform apart from the <a href="https://goo.gle/devtools-recorder" data-v-09b4348a>usual add to cart flows.</a></p><ul data-v-09b4348a><li data-v-09b4348a>Double click on coffee title to translate it to Chinese.</li><li data-v-09b4348a>Right click on coffee icon to open an add to cart dialog.</li><li data-v-09b4348a>[Desktop only] Hover over Pay button will show a quick cart preview, click to add or remove items.</li><li data-v-09b4348a>A random promo coffee pop up show up when adding every 3rd items to the cart. (e.g. 3, 6, 9, ...)</li><li data-v-09b4348a>The add to cart process will be slowing down (intentionally) when the cart has more than 7 items.</li><li data-v-09b4348a>Slow down page load performance with ads by passing in an <code data-v-09b4348a>ads</code> param. <a href="https://coffee-cart.app/?ad=1" data-v-09b4348a>https://coffee-cart.app/?ad=1</a></li><li data-v-09b4348a>Simulate throw an error when adding coffee to cart. <a href="https://coffee-cart.app/?breakable=1" data-v-09b4348a>https://coffee-cart.app/?breakable=1</a></li></ul><p data-v-09b4348a>You can use this demo to learn DevTools features. We have tutorial and video to guide you.</p><ul data-v-09b4348a><li data-v-09b4348a>Record, replay and measure user flows with the Recorder panel (<a href="https://goo.gle/devtools-recorder" data-v-09b4348a>link</a>).</li><li data-v-09b4348a>Get actionable insights for your websites&#39; performance with the Performance insights panel (<a href="https://goo.gle/devtools-performance" data-v-09b4348a>link</a>) </li></ul>', 5);

          Solution

          Eliminar todos los comentarios que muestren información que pueda ayudar a un atacante y solucionar el problema al que se refieren.
      3. Recuperado de la Caché (1)
        1. GET https://coffee-cart.app/assets/index-b859522e.css
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2025_A07
          • CWE-525
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • OWASP_2021_A07
          • SYSTEMIC
          • WSTG-v42-ATHN-06
          • OWASP_2017_A02
          Alert description

          El contenido se ha recuperado de una caché compartida. Si los datos de respuesta son sensibles, personales o específicos del usuario, esto puede resultar en la filtración de información sensible. En algunos casos, esto puede incluso resultar en que un usuario obtenga el control completo de la sesión de otro usuario, dependiendo de la configuración de los componentes de caché en uso en su entorno. Este problema se produce principalmente cuando los servidores de caché, como los "proxy", están configurados en la red local. Esta configuración se encuentra típicamente en entornos corporativos o educativos, por ejemplo.
          Other info

          La presencia de la cabecera 'Age' indica que se está utilizando un servidor de caché compatible con HTTP/1.1.

.snackbar[data-v-0c450641] {
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 100%;

  z-index: 1;
  font-size: x-large;
  border-block: 4px solid black;

}
.fade-enter-active[data-v-0c450641],

}
.fade-enter-from[data-v-0c450641],
.fade-leave-to[data-v-0c450641] {

body {
  font-size: 18px;
  background: rgb(224, 255, 255, 0.15);
  font-family: 'Lobster', Times;
}

.cup[data-v-400a88f7] {
  display: flex;
  will-change: transform;
}
.cup-body[data-v-400a88f7] {
  width: 200px;
  height: 180px;
  border: 6px solid black;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column-reverse;
  border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.cup-body.bigger[data-v-400a88f7] {
  height: 240px;
  width: 220px;
}
.cup-handler[data-v-400a88f7] {
  width: 30px;
  height: 72px;
  margin-top: 18px;
  background-color: initial;
  border-bottom-right-radius: 100px;
  border-top-right-radius: 100px;
  border: 8px solid black;
  border-left: 0;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.cup[data-v-400a88f7]:hover {
  cursor: pointer;
  transform: rotate(-4deg);
}
.cup:hover .cup-body[data-v-400a88f7] {
  border-color: goldenrod;
}
.cup:hover .cup-handler[data-v-400a88f7] {
  border-color: goldenrod;
}
.ingredient[data-v-400a88f7] {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}
.disabled-hover[data-v-400a88f7] {
  pointer-events: none;
  border-color: initial;
}
.disabled-hover[data-v-400a88f7]:hover {
  pointer-events: none;
  border-color: black;
}

/* recipe */
.espresso[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(222, 98, 38);
}
.milk.foam[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(198, 218, 181);
}
.steamed.milk[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(178, 187, 140);
}
.steamed.cream[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(239, 238, 217);
}
.chocolate.syrup[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(154, 128, 69);
}
.whipped.cream[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(183, 221, 220);
}
.water[data-v-400a88f7] {
  background-color: rgb(127, 195, 179);
}

.modal[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  position: fixed; /* Stay in place */
  z-index: 1; /* Sit on top */
  padding-top: 100px; /* Location of the box */
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  width: 100%;  /* Full width */
  height: 100%; /* Full height */
  overflow: auto; /* Enable scroll if needed */
  background-color: rgb(0,0,0); /* Fallback color */
  background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); /* Black w/ opacity */
}

/* Modal Content */
.modal-content[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  background-color: #fefefe;
  margin: auto;
  padding-inline: 20px;
  padding-block: 10px;
  /* border: 1px solid #888; */
  width: 80%;
  max-width: 600px;
  min-width: 300px;
  border: 4px solid black;
}

/* The Close Button */
.close[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  color: slategrey;
  float: right;
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: bold;
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
}
.close[data-v-29c3be1b]:hover,
.close[data-v-29c3be1b]:focus {
  color: #000;
  text-decoration: none;
  cursor: pointer;
}
h1[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  margin-block: 16px;
}
section[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
}
form label[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  margin-inline-end: 10px;
  padding-block: 10px;
}
form input[type="checkbox"][data-v-29c3be1b] {
  margin-inline-end: 10px;
}
form input[type="email"][data-v-29c3be1b], form input[type="text"][data-v-29c3be1b] {
  padding-block: 4px;
  padding-inline: 10px;
}
form div[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  padding-block: 10px;
}
form div[data-v-29c3be1b]:last-of-type {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}
form button[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  border: 4px solid black;
  background: antiquewhite;
  margin: 0 6px;
  font-size: x-large;
}
form button[data-v-29c3be1b]:hover {
  border-color: goldenrod;
  color: goldenrod;
}
p[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  margin-block: 10px;
}
.size[data-v-29c3be1b] {
  animation: mymove-29c3be1b 2s infinite;
}
@keyframes mymove-29c3be1b {
from {background-color: rgb(127, 195, 179);
}
to {background-color: rgb(222, 98, 38);}
  /* to {background-color: rgb(178, 187, 140);} */
}

}
button.pay[data-v-a68519c8]:hover {

}

}

  display: none;

}

}

li[data-v-8965af83] {

}
li[data-v-8965af83] {

}

li div[data-v-8965af83]:first-child {

/* total */

}

}

}
}

          Evidence 
          Age: 0
          Solution

          Válida que la respuesta no contenga información confidencial, personal o específica del usuario. Si es así, considere el uso de los siguientes encabezados de respuesta HTTP para limitar o evitar que otro usuario almacene y recupere el contenido de la memoria caché:

          Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate, private

          Pragma: no-cache

          Expires: 0

          Esta configuración indica a los servidores de almacenamiento en caché compatibles con HTTP 1.0 y HTTP 1.1 que no almacenen la respuesta ni la recuperen (sin validación) de la memoria caché en respuesta a una solicitud similar.

    for (const mutation of mutations2) {

    const fetchOpts = {};
    if (link.integrity)
      fetchOpts.integrity = link.integrity;
    if (link.referrerPolicy)
      fetchOpts.referrerPolicy = link.referrerPolicy;
    if (link.crossOrigin === "use-credentials")
      fetchOpts.credentials = "include";
    else if (link.crossOrigin === "anonymous")
      fetchOpts.credentials = "omit";

      fetchOpts.credentials = "same-origin";
    return fetchOpts;

            n2,

            internals

  const processElement = (n1, n2, container, anchor, parentComponent, parentSuspense, isSVG, slotScopeIds, optimized) => {

        parentSuspense,

          next = vnode;

    const oldLength = c1.length;
    const newLength = c2.length;

  const patchKeyedChildren = (c1, c2, container, parentAnchor, parentComponent, parentSuspense, isSVG, slotScopeIds, optimized) => {

          parentComponent,
          parentSuspense,

      const s1 = i;
      const s2 = i;
      const keyToNewIndexMap = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();
      for (i = s2; i <= e2; i++) {
        const nextChild = c2[i] = optimized ? cloneIfMounted(c2[i]) : normalizeVNode(c2[i]);
        if (nextChild.key != null) {
          keyToNewIndexMap.set(nextChild.key, i);

      let patched = 0;
      const toBePatched = e2 - s2 + 1;
      let moved = false;
      let maxNewIndexSoFar = 0;

      showAd: this.$route.query.ad,
      renderAd: false,
      showPromo: false,
      breakable: this.$route.query.breakable,
      waitTime: 1e3,
      timeoutId: null,
      isBigger: false,
      selectedCoffee: "",
      translation: {
        "Espresso": "特浓咖啡",
        "Espresso Macchiato": "浓缩玛奇朵",
        "Cappuccino": "卡布奇诺",
        "Mocha": "摩卡",
        "Flat White": "平白咖啡",
        "Americano": "美式咖啡",
        "Cafe Latte": "拿铁",
        "Espresso Con Panna": "浓缩康宝蓝",
        "Cafe Breve": "半拿铁"
      }
    };
  },
  created() {
    if (this.showAd) {
      window.addEventListener("message", this.resizeFrame);
      this.$store.commit("coffees/setWaitTime", this.waitTime * 0.5);
      this.timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
        this.renderAd = true;
        this.renderFonts();
      }, this.waitTime * 2.5);
      slow();
    }
    this.$store.dispatch("coffees/getCoffeeList");
  },
  unmounted() {
    window.removeEventListener("message", this.resizeFrame);
    if (this.timeoutId) {
      clearTimeout(this.timeoutId);
      this.timeoutId = null;
    }
  },
  methods: {
    currency,
    // ...mapMutations("cart", ["addToCart"]),
    addToCart(name) {
      slow();
      this.$store.commit("cart/addToCart", name);
      if (this.$route.query.breakable) {
        console.error("Some additional workflow is broken.");
      }
    },
    showMenu(coffee2, event) {
      event.preventDefault();
      this.selectedCoffee = coffee2;
      this.$refs.dialog.showModal();
    },
    togglePromo(count) {
      this.showPromo = count > 0 && count % 3 == 0;
      return;
    },
    closedPromo() {
      this.showPromo = false;
    },
    resizeFrame() {
      const iframe = this.$refs.iframe;
      iframe.width = window.innerWidth + "px";
      iframe.height = "300px";
    },
    renderFonts() {
      this.timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {
        const newStyle = document.createElement("style");
        this.renderAd = true;
        newStyle.appendChild(document.createTextNode(`
          @font-face {
            font-family: 'Lobster';
            font-style: normal;
            font-display: swap;
            font-weight: 400;
            size-adjust: 140%;
            line-gap-override: 150%;
            descent-override: 30%;
            src: url(https://fonts.gstatic.com/s/lobster/v27/neILzCirqoswsqX9zoKmM4MwWJU.woff2) format('woff2');
            unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+2000-206F, U+2074, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;
          }

        `));
        document.head.appendChild(newStyle);
        this.isBigger = true;
      }, this.waitTime * 1.5);
    },
    translate(coffee2) {
      this.$store.commit("coffees/translateCoffee", coffee2);
    }
  }
});

Report in the repository if you found any issues.</p><p data-v-09b4348a>Here are the extra actions you can perform apart from the <a href="https://goo.gle/devtools-recorder" data-v-09b4348a>usual add to cart flows.</a></p><ul data-v-09b4348a><li data-v-09b4348a>Double click on coffee title to translate it to Chinese.</li><li data-v-09b4348a>Right click on coffee icon to open an add to cart dialog.</li><li data-v-09b4348a>[Desktop only] Hover over Pay button will show a quick cart preview, click to add or remove items.</li><li data-v-09b4348a>A random promo coffee pop up show up when adding every 3rd items to the cart. (e.g. 3, 6, 9, ...)</li><li data-v-09b4348a>The add to cart process will be slowing down (intentionally) when the cart has more than 7 items.</li><li data-v-09b4348a>Slow down page load performance with ads by passing in an <code data-v-09b4348a>ads</code> param. <a href="https://coffee-cart.app/?ad=1" data-v-09b4348a>https://coffee-cart.app/?ad=1</a></li><li data-v-09b4348a>Simulate throw an error when adding coffee to cart. <a href="https://coffee-cart.app/?breakable=1" data-v-09b4348a>https://coffee-cart.app/?breakable=1</a></li></ul><p data-v-09b4348a>You can use this demo to learn DevTools features.   7. Risk=Informativo, Confidence=Baja (1)

    1. https://coffee-cart.app (1)

      1. Reexaminar las Directivas de Control de Caché (1)
        1. GET https://coffee-cart.app/
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2025_A07
          • CWE-525
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • OWASP_2021_A07
          • SYSTEMIC
          • WSTG-v42-ATHN-06
          • OWASP_2017_A02
          Alert description

          La cabecera cache-control no se ha configurado correctamente o falta, lo que permite al navegador y a los proxies almacenar contenido en caché. Para activos estáticos como css, js, o archivos de imagen esto puede ser intencionado, sin embargo, los recursos deben ser revisados para asegurar que ningún contenido sensible será cacheado.
          Request
          Request line and header section (634 bytes) 
          GET https://coffee-cart.app/ HTTP/1.1
host: coffee-cart.app
Connection: keep-alive
sec-ch-ua: "Chromium";v="148", "Google Chrome";v="148", "Not/A)Brand";v="99"
sec-ch-ua-mobile: ?0
sec-ch-ua-platform: "Linux"
Upgrade-Insecure-Requests: 1
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/148.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7
Sec-Fetch-Site: none
Sec-Fetch-Mode: navigate
Sec-Fetch-User: ?1
Sec-Fetch-Dest: document
Accept-Language: es-ES,es;q=0.9
          Request body (0 bytes)
          Response
          Status line and header section (387 bytes) 
          HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Accept-Ranges: bytes
Age: 8049
Cache-Control: public,max-age=0,must-revalidate
Cache-Status: "Netlify Edge"; hit
Content-Length: 938
Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8
Date: Thu, 14 May 2026 21:44:42 GMT
Etag: "29ffa7ab90f7af1346474348cf73ed3e-ssl"
Server: Netlify
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000
X-Nf-Request-Id: 01KRM75WA3REV5VBSD8VRZEF5D
          Response body (938 bytes) 
          <!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico" />
  <link rel="stylesheet"
    href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/normalize/8.0.1/normalize.min.css">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>Coffee cart</title>
  <!-- Google tag (gtag.js) -->
  <script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=G-LB75G4EJT9"></script>
  <script>
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
    gtag('js', new Date());

    gtag('config', 'G-LB75G4EJT9');
  </script>
  <script type="module" crossorigin src="/assets/index-8bfa4912.js"></script>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/index-b859522e.css">
</head>

<body>
  <div id="app"></div>
  <!-- disable for Core Web Vitals measurement -->
  <!-- <div id="invisible" width="200" height="200"></div> -->
  
</body>

</html>
          Parameter 
          cache-control
          Evidence 
          public,max-age=0,must-revalidate
          Solution

          Para contenido seguro, asegúrese de que la cabecera HTTP cache-control está configurada con «no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate». Si un activo debe almacenarse en caché, considere establecer las directivas «public, max-age, immutable».

Appendix

Alert Types

This section contains additional information on the types of alerts in the report.

  1. Cabecera Content Security Policy (CSP) no configurada

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Cabecera Content Security Policy (CSP) no configurada)
    CWE ID 693
    WASC ID 15
    Reference
    1. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Guides/CSP
    2. https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/Content_Security_Policy_Cheat_Sheet.html
    3. https://www.w3.org/TR/CSP/
    4. https://w3c.github.io/webappsec-csp/
    5. https://web.dev/articles/csp
    6. https://caniuse.com/#feat=contentsecuritypolicy
    7. https://content-security-policy.com/

  2. Configuración Incorrecta Cross-Domain

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Configuración Incorrecta Cross-Domain)
    CWE ID 264
    WASC ID 14
    Reference
    1. https://vulncat.fortify.com/en/detail?category=HTML5&subcategory=Overly%20Permissive%20CORS%20Policy

  3. Falta atributo de integridad de recursos secundarios

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Falta atributo de integridad de recursos secundarios)
    CWE ID 345
    WASC ID 15
    Reference
    1. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Security/Subresource_Integrity

  4. Falta de cabecera Anti-Clickjacking

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Cabecera Anti-Clickjacking)
    CWE ID 1021
    WASC ID 15
    Reference
    1. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Reference/Headers/X-Frame-Options

  5. ID de sesión en la Reescritura de URL

    Source raised by a passive scanner (ID de sesión en la Reescritura de URL)
    CWE ID 598
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://seclists.org/webappsec/2002/q4/111

  6. Divulgación de Marcas de Tiempo - Unix

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Divulgación de Marcas de Tiempo)
    CWE ID 497
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/200.html

  7. El servidor filtra información de versión a través del campo "Server" del encabezado de respuesta HTTP

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Cabecera de Respuesta del Servidor HTTP)
    CWE ID 497
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://httpd.apache.org/docs/current/mod/core.html#servertokens
    2. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/msp-n-p/ff648552(v=pandp.10)
    3. https://www.troyhunt.com/shhh-dont-let-your-response-headers/

  8. Falta encabezado X-Content-Type-Options

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Falta encabezado X-Content-Type-Options)
    CWE ID 693
    WASC ID 15
    Reference
    1. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/internet-explorer/ie-developer/compatibility/gg622941(v=vs.85)
    2. https://owasp.org/www-community/Security_Headers

  9. Inclusión de archivos fuente JavaScript entre dominios

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Inclusión de archivos fuente JavaScript entre dominios)
    CWE ID 829
    WASC ID 15

  10. Strict-Transport-Security Header No Establecido

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Strict-Transport-Security Header)
    CWE ID 319
    WASC ID 15
    Reference
    1. https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/HTTP_Strict_Transport_Security_Cheat_Sheet.html
    2. https://owasp.org/www-community/Security_Headers
    3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/HTTP_Strict_Transport_Security
    4. https://caniuse.com/stricttransportsecurity
    5. https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6797

  11. Aplicación Web Moderna

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Aplicación Web Moderna)

  12. Divulgación de información - Comentarios sospechosos

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Divulgación de información - Comentarios sospechosos)
    CWE ID 615
    WASC ID 13

  13. Recuperado de la Caché

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Recuperado de la Caché)
    CWE ID 525
    Reference
    1. https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc7234
    2. https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc7231
    3. https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9110.html

  14. Reexaminar las Directivas de Control de Caché

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Reexaminar las Directivas de Control de Caché)
    CWE ID 525
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/Session_Management_Cheat_Sheet.html#web-content-caching
    2. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Reference/Headers/Cache-Control
    3. https://grayduck.mn/2021/09/13/cache-control-recommendations/
